Find the Revenue
Your Business Is
Leaving Behind.

Most mid-size businesses lose 20–40% of potential revenue to disconnected systems, manual processes and misfiring AI. Zonar™ diagnoses exactly where — and shows you what to fix first.

🔍
Revenue Gap Analysis
We map your sales, marketing and operations — and show exactly where revenue is leaking and why.
🎯
3 Highest-ROI AI Opportunities
Not a generic list. Your top 3 AI plays ranked by impact and effort — specific to your business, your industry, your team size.
🗺️
90-Day Implementation Roadmap
A week-by-week plan. Exactly what to build, what tools to use, what to do first. No guesswork.

Get Your Free AI Audit

Takes 2 minutes. Personalised to your business.
Delivered within 24 hours.

No spam. No pitch calls. Unsubscribe anytime.
This Audit Is For You If...

You're Running a Real Business.
Not a Startup Experiment.

🏢
Mid-size businesses
20–500 employees generating real revenue who want to grow without proportionally growing headcount.
🇦🇪
UAE & MENA companies
Based in Dubai, Abu Dhabi or wider MENA. We understand the market, the culture, and what AI actually works here.
⚡
Leaders ready to act
You've heard about AI long enough. You want to know specifically what it means for your business — and what to do this quarter.
The Process

From Form to Report in 24 Hours

1
Complete the 2-minute form
Tell us about your business — team size, revenue, biggest challenge. No trick questions. No sales trap.
2
Zonar™ analyses your business profile
Our AI engine maps your answers against 50+ revenue leakage patterns we've identified across UAE and MENA mid-size businesses.
3
Your personalised report arrives in your inbox
Within 24 hours. A clear, specific report — your 3 highest-ROI AI opportunities and a 90-day roadmap to capture them.
4
Optional: 30-minute call with a senior advisor
If you want to go deeper, we'll book a call to walk through your report and answer your questions. No pressure. Just clarity.

What Happens After the Audit

Real feedback from real businesses.

"The audit showed us exactly where we were losing leads after the first meeting. Three weeks later that leak was fixed and our close rate went up 28%."

Professional Services, Dubai
